title: Match the distance metric to the embedder
description: Use the similarity metric the embedding model was trained for (cosine, dot, or L2) and normalize vectors consistently.
body: Use when configuring an index's similarity function. Do not pick a metric arbitrarily — an embedder trained for cosine similarity behaves differently under raw dot product if vectors are not normalized. Actions: read the embedding model's intended metric, normalize vectors when cosine is expected, configure the index with the matching distance, and verify a known pair scores as most similar. Validation signals include a metric matching the model card and a sanity check where semantically close items rank closest. Risk boundary: a mismatched metric silently distorts ranking; if the model's intended metric is unknown, escalate rather than guessing, since wrong distance degrades every query.
